segments.text: This is a sensitive question that I am asking due to protocol. Do you or your husband have any sexually transmitted diseases, HIV, AIDS, or similar conditions?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: It's our private matter.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Correct. Has your weight unusually increased or decreased, are there any symptoms of that, or any medication or operation for it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When was your last menstrual period? How long ago?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It's been about 10 years.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When you were pregnant, did your BP or sugar increase, or were there any complications during pregnancy?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing at all. My children were born at home, not by C-section.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Correct. Any lump in the breast area, any breast problem, irregular or painful periods, abnormal vaginal bleeding, or any female reproductive organ issues (uterus, ovaries, vagina) that required you to see a gynecologist?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I never showed it, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: All the answers you have given me right now, are they true?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, all of them are true, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And these answers will be in your policy record, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Because I am a Patel, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Correct.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, my weight is 49 kg.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, thank you.
